description: Legal record (#15). Deposition in court. Dated: Monday, 29 Iyyar 1467 Seleucid. Abū l-Makārim b. Salāma al-Kohen known as Ibn al-Maqāniʿiyya states that he was passing by Dār al-Ṭāwūs when Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm al-Tājir called out to him. He found Hiba al-Labbān and Mūsā b. Bishr standing with Abū Isḥāq and with Hilāl b. al-Raṣṣāṣ. All these people testified that Hilāl agreed that whatever money was lost(?) by Abū Isḥāq al-Tājir and was not paid by Abū l-Khayr b. Nājī (as promised by Hilāl in the previous record, see Yevr.-Arab. I 1700.8, recto b)—would be guaranteed by Hilāl. Witnesses: Ḥiyya b. Yiṣḥaq; Hillel b. Ṣadoq Av Bet Din; Mevorakh b. Natan.
description_he: פנקס משפטי; עדות בבית דין; 29 אייר 1467 סלאוקי; אבו אל-מכארם בן סלאמה הכהן מעיד שהלאל בן אל-רצאץ ערב לכל כסף שאבד לאבו יצחק אברהים ולא שולם על ידי אבו אל-ח'יר בן נאג'י
